payload.title: Add /api/history project-scoped endpoint
payload.description: New GET /api/history?project=<id>&limit=<n>&offset=<n> endpoint. Queries ticket_history joined with tickets so each row has: ticket_id, ticket_title, field, old_value, new_value, changed_by, changed_at. Enables the history view and can be polled/pushed via SSE.
